history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with defined abs and dark hair, wearing black swim trunks and a silver cross necklace, stands in shallow ocean water. He is looking to his right, with a slight smile, and wearing dark sunglasses. The background shows a sandy beach with a few people walking in the distance, and the blue ocean with gentle waves under a clear, bright blue sky. The lighting is natural and sunny, casting soft shadows. The overall mood is relaxed and summery. The color palette is dominated by the blues of the sky and ocean, the sandy beige of the beach, and the dark black of the swim trunks, contrasted with the warm skin tone of the man. The style is photorealistic, capturing a candid moment.
